allow: Bash(pwsh -Command "git clone --depth 1 ''''https://github.com/anthropics/skills'''' ''''$env:TEMP/skills-check''''; Get-ChildItem ''''$env:TEMP/skills-check/skills'''' -Directory | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name | Sort-Object; Remove-Item ''''$env:TEMP/skills-check'''' -Recurse -Force")
